form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th over 515m at Sandown beaten 1.75 lengths (30.18) behind Billy Ray Mikado in a Grade 5 on March 30. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 5th over 515m at Sandown beaten 1.75 lengths (30.18) behind Billy Ray Mikado in a Grade 5 on March 30. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

form.formComment: Last start finished last on March 19 over 520m at this track behind Ripper Joe beaten 17 lengths (31.28) in a Grade 5. Has a very good strike-rate out of box 2, scoring two times. Go close.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished last on March 19 over 520m at this track behind Ripper Joe beaten 17 lengths (31.28) in a Grade 5. Has a very good strike-rate out of box 2, scoring two times. Go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At the first turn came together.
Rounding the home turn came together.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in her races. Last start finished fourth over 520m at this track, beaten 8 lengths. Needs to find a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in her races. Last start finished fourth over 520m at this track, beaten 8 lengths. Needs to find a bit more.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 6 length fifth over 525m at Taree Super Track. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 6 length fifth over 525m at Taree Super Track. Can't enthuse on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together rounding the turn out of the back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 300m at Taree Super Track. Tempted to look elsewhere.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 300m at Taree Super Track. Tempted to look elsewhere.

form.formComment: Hasn't produced too much recently, and faces tougher opposition here. Others preferred at this stage.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hasn't produced too much recently, and faces tougher opposition here. Others preferred at this stage.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 340m boxes galloped awkwardly and lost momentum.
Was bumped on the hindquarters on numerous occasions in the back straight.

form.formComment: Starting from wide draw and hasn't shown anything recently, all starting at big odds. Will be tested in this company.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Starting from wide draw and hasn't shown anything recently, all starting at big odds. Will be tested in this company.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the first turn came together.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last over 515m at The Gardens beaten 9 lengths (30.41) behind Modest Man in a Grade 4/5 on April 11. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished last over 515m at The Gardens beaten 9 lengths (30.41) behind Modest Man in a Grade 4/5 on April 11. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Completed the event with a dislodged muzzle.
Bumped repeatedly along the home straight.
